title: Broken Ruin
description: This mod adds a brand-new Broken Ruin to Forest biomes.
body:
Broken Ruin Structure

This mod adds a brand-new Broken Ruin to Forest biomes.

![Broken Ruin Top Night View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95d94fdc9d356b5d1db73d0ed67429e9d7dd1ad5.jpeg)![Broken Ruin Top Night View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71cf1c6e105b6ba3e319d2b40e786a0885ca86a8.jpeg)

Broken Ruin:

An ancient, crumbling structure filled with mystery.
Explore its remains to uncover treasures.
You are free to include this mod in your modpacks
